cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that the Add a new site page renders with all required fields and controls
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. At least one website already exists in the account.

steps.content: Open the website selector dropdown next to the CookieYes logo in the header and click "+ New Site".
steps.expected: The "Add a new site" page should be displayed.

steps.content: Locate the "1. Site details" card.
steps.expected: The card should display an "Organization *" dropdown, a "Site URL *" text field, and a "Site name" text field, with Organization and Site URL marked as required.

steps.content: Locate the "2. Select Plan" card.
steps.expected: The card should display "Monthly" and "Annual" billing toggle options, with "Monthly" selected by default.

steps.content: Observe the Currency dropdown on the Select Plan card.
steps.expected: The Currency dropdown should be present with "USD $" selected by default.

steps.content: Observe the plan columns on the Select Plan card.
steps.expected: Free, Basic, Pro, and Ultimate plan columns should each be displayed with a "Get Started" button.

steps.content: Click the "See all features and compare plans" control below the plans table.
steps.expected: The plans table should expand to show the full feature comparison list across all plan columns.

steps.content: Locate the "X Cancel" control on the page.
steps.expected: The "X Cancel" button should be visible and interactive.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that submitting with no organization selected shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Leave the "Organisation *" dropdown with no organisation selected.
steps.expected: No organisation should be selected in the "Organisation *" dropdown.

steps.content: Enter a valid site URL in the "Site URL *" field.
steps.expected: The entered URL should be accepted in the field.

steps.content: Click the "Get Started" button on any plan column.
steps.expected: The "Organisation is required" validation message should be displayed under the "Organisation *" dropdown and submission should be blocked.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that submitting with an invalid site URL shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Select an organization from the "Organization *" dropdown.
steps.expected: The selected organization should be set in the dropdown.

steps.content: Enter an invalid URL in the "Site URL *" field.
steps.expected: The entered value should be accepted into the field.

steps.content: Click the "Get Started" button on any plan column.
steps.expected: The "Valid website required" validation message should be displayed under the "Site URL *" field and submission should be blocked.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that submitting with an empty site URL shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Select an organization from the "Organization *" dropdown.
steps.expected: The selected organization should be set in the dropdown.

steps.content: Leave the "Site URL *" field empty.
steps.expected: The "Site URL *" field should remain blank.

steps.content: Click the "Get Started" button on any plan column.
steps.expected: The "URL is required" validation message should be displayed under the "Site URL *" field and submission should be blocked.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that a new site is created and the entered site name is saved
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page. A valid payment card is available for checkout.

steps.content: Select an organization from the "Organization *" dropdown.
steps.expected: The selected organization should be set in the dropdown.

steps.content: Enter a valid site URL in the "Site URL *" field and a site name in the "Site name" field.
steps.expected: Both values should be accepted into their fields.

steps.content: Click the "Get Started" button on a plan column and complete the Stripe checkout with valid card details.
steps.expected: After subscribing, the Banner setup page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click "Next Step", then "Go to Dashboard", and proceed through the "Banner isn't installed yet" prompt via "Done! Take me to Dashboard".
steps.expected: The Dashboard for the newly created site should be displayed.

steps.content: Open the user profile dropdown and go to "Organization and Sites".
steps.expected: The Organization and Sites page should be displayed.

steps.content: Locate the newly created site in the list.
steps.expected: The entered site name should be shown under the "Site name" column for the new site.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that toggling between Monthly and Annual billing updates plan prices
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Confirm the billing period toggle state on the Select Plan card.
steps.expected: "Monthly" should be selected by default and plan columns should show per-month pricing.

steps.content: Select the "Annual" billing option.
steps.expected: The plan columns should update to show annual (per-year) pricing for Basic, Pro, and Ultimate.

steps.content: Select the "Monthly" billing option again.
steps.expected: The plan columns should revert to per-month pricing.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that changing the Currency updates plan prices to the selected currency
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Open the Currency dropdown on the Select Plan card.
steps.expected: The dropdown should list USD $, GBP £, and EUR € options, with USD $ selected by default.

steps.content: Select "GBP £".
steps.expected: The plan columns should update to display prices in GBP (£).

steps.content: Select "EUR €".
steps.expected: The plan columns should update to display prices in EUR (€).

steps.content: Select "USD $".
steps.expected: The plan columns should update to display prices in USD ($).

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that selecting a plan with Get Started subscribes the new site to that plan
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page with a valid organization selected and a valid site URL entered. A valid payment card is available for checkout.

steps.content: Select the desired billing currency from the Currency dropdown.
steps.expected: The chosen currency should be selected and plan prices should display in that currency.

steps.content: Click "Get Started" on the chosen plan column (Basic, Pro, or Ultimate).
steps.expected: The Stripe checkout page should be displayed showing the selected plan price in the selected currency.

steps.content: Enter valid card details and click "Subscribe".
steps.expected: The subscription should complete and the Banner setup page should be displayed.

steps.content: Proceed through "Next Step", "Go to Dashboard", and the "Banner isn't installed yet" prompt to reach the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Dashboard for the new site should be displayed.

steps.content: Open the user profile dropdown, go to "Organization and Sites", and locate the new site.
steps.expected: The new site should show the subscribed plan name and price (in the selected currency) under the "Plan" field, matching the chosen plan.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that the Cancel button discards site creation and returns to the Dashboard
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Click the "X Cancel" button in the top-right of the page.
steps.expected: The page should close without creating a site and the Dashboard should be displayed.

cases.title: [Add a New Site] Verify that the “reach out to support” link opens the CookieYes troubleshoot page
cases.preconditions: User is on the "Add a new site" page.

steps.content: Locate the "* To activate scan behind login, reach out to support" footnote at the bottom-left of the page.
steps.expected: The "reach out to support" portion should be rendered as a link.

steps.content: Click the "reach out to support" link.
steps.expected: The CookieYes troubleshoot page (cookieyes.com/support/#troubleshoot) should open in a new tab.
